title: Apply all 7 architecture cleanup fixes
description: Apply all 7 fixes from the plan. Read each file before editing. Workspace root: d:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine. Fix 1: In backend/app/core/database.py — remove the get_db() async generator function (lines ~47-56) and remove the unused 'from typing import AsyncGenerator' import if no longer needed. The canonical get_db lives in dependencies.py. Fix 2: In backend/app/agents/validator.py — remove 'from dotenv import load_dotenv' and 'load_dotenv(override=True)' lines. In backend/app/agents/generator_agent.py — remove 'from dotenv import load_dotenv', 'load_dotenv(override=True)', and 'import os'. Rewrite get_model() to use settings: import settings from app.core.config, use settings.GEMINI_MODEL instead of os.getenv('GEMINI_MODEL', ...), and settings.effective_api_key instead of os.getenv('GEMINI_API_KEY'). Fix 3: In backend/app/models/survey.py — remove the 'context_similarity_threshold = Column(Float, ...)' line. In backend/app/schemas/survey.py — remove context_similarity_threshold from CreateSurveyRequest, UpdateSurveyRequest, and SurveyResponse classes. In backend/app/api/admin.py — remove context_similarity_threshold from the _survey_to_response() helper. In backend/app/services/survey_service.py — remove context_similarity_threshold from the create_survey() function's Survey() constructor call. Fix 4: In backend/app/models/response.py — remove 'question_embedding = Column(Text, nullable=True)' line. Fix 5: In backend/app/core/config.py — remove the 'GEMINI_EMBEDDING_MODEL: str = ...' line. Fix 6: In backend/app/api/router.py — remove the 'from app.api.health import router as health_router' import and 'api_router.include_router(health_router)' line. Health is already mounted directly in main.py. Fix 7: In backend/app/services/question_service.py — move the inline 'from app.repositories import survey_repo' (inside process_answer()) to the top-level imports alongside the existing 'from app.repositories import response_repo, session_repo'. Change that line to 'from app.repositories import response_repo, session_repo, survey_repo'. Then delete the inline import from inside process_answer().

title: Run tests and fix any breakage
description: Run the full test suite: cd d:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine\backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v. If any tests fail due to the cleanup (e.g. tests referencing context_similarity_threshold or question_embedding), fix them. Ensure all tests pass.

title: Backend code review
description: Review all modified files for: (1) no leftover references to load_dotenv, os.getenv, context_similarity_threshold, question_embedding, or GEMINI_EMBEDDING_MODEL, (2) no duplicate get_db, (3) health route only at /health not /api/v1/health, (4) no inline imports in services, (5) generator_agent.py uses settings correctly.

title: Push changes to branch
description: Commit all changes and push to 'chore/arch-cleanup' branch. Commit message: 'chore: architecture cleanup — remove dead code, consolidate config, fix duplicates'.
